case_id: Unique identifier for each case or patient.
age: Age of the individual in years.
country: Country of residence or origin of the individual.
smoking_history: Details about the individual's smoking history.
smoke_age_start: Age at which the individual started smoking.
smoke_age_stop: Age at which the individual stopped smoking or current age if still smoking.
num_smoke_per_day: Number of cigarettes smoked per day.
smoking_inferred: Inferred smoking status based on strong evidence.
alcohol_consum: Alcohol consumption history and current status.
num_yrs_alc_con: Number of years of alcohol consumption.
tumor_site_original: Original site of the tumor before any treatment.
tumor_site_curated: Curated site of the tumor, categorized into broader regions.
tumor_focality: Indicates whether the tumor is unifocal or multifocal.
tumor_size_cm: Size of the tumor in centimeters.
histologic_type: Type of histologic diagnosis, specifically squamous cell carcinoma.
histologic_grade: Grade of the tumor's differentiation, ranging from G1 to G3.
tumor_necrosis: Presence or absence of tumor necrosis.
patho_staging_pn: Pathological staging for regional lymph nodes (pN).
tumor_stage: Overall tumor stage based on clinical and pathological assessments.
NAT_pathology_review: Pathological review of normal adjacent tissue.
tumor_pathology_review: Pathological review of tumor tissue composition.
ESTIMATE_stromal_score: Quantitative score indicating stromal cell activity in tumor microenvironment.
ESTIMATE_immune_score: Quantitative score indicating immune cell activity in tumor microenvironment.
CD3_IHC_count: Count of CD3 positive cells detected by immunohistochemistry.
stemness_score: Quantitative measure indicating the stem-like properties of cells.
mutation_count: Total number of mutations identified in the genomic analysis.
neoAntigen_count: Number of neoantigens detected, often used in cancer immunotherapy.
chr_instability_idx: Index reflecting chromosomal instability within the sample.
integrated_subtype: Integrated subtype classification based on multiple genomic features.
transcriptomic_subtype: Subtype classification based on transcriptomic profiles.
